name: Car Stunts 2050
description: Engage in exhilarating car stunts and adrenaline-pumping action as you take the wheel in this high-octane racing game. Push your driving skills to the limit as you execute jaw-dropping stunts that defy gravity and logic. Leap through flaming hoops, perform barrel rolls, and execute breathtaking jumps over ramps. The game offers a variety of challenging levels, each designed to test your mastery of the wheel and your audacity for stunts. Website Developer
tags: 3D Games, Android, Cars, Driving, HTML5, Mentolatux, Mobile, Racing, Stunts, Supercars, WebGL
